name: Sergei Yakima
label: Software Engineer
summary: Passionate software engineer with a strong foundation in Python and C++. Experienced in developing machine learning models, with a particular focus on machine vision and AI-driven automation. Adept at reverse engineering and software analysis, bringing a problem-solving mindset to complex challenges. In addition to research and development, I have experience teaching programming and assisting students in mastering software concepts. Always eager to explore new AI technologies and build innovative solutions.

work_experience.summary: Assisted in teaching programming courses, guiding students through assignments and problem-solving.
Designed and delivered Python programming lessons to high school students.
highlights: Developed structured lesson plans covering Python fundamentals
Conducted hands-on coding exercises and debugging sessions

work_experience.summary: Contributed to the development of mechanical and electrical prototypes.
highlights: Collaborated with engineers to design and test hardware components
Conducted static code analysis to identify and resolve issues
Worked on improving prototype efficiency and functionality

work_experience.summary: Tutored high school students in mathematics, physics, programming, and English.
highlights: Provided personalized tutoring to improve academic performance
Conducted group and individual lessons tailored to student needs
Simplified complex subjects through engaging and interactive teaching methods

interests.name: Programming
interests.summary: Passionate about programming for fun, nothing brings more joy than automating tasks.

interests.name: Reverse Engineering
interests.summary: Analyzing and making sense of compiled software is a challenging yet rewarding experience.

interests.name: PC Building
interests.summary: Building computers requires just the right amount of know-how and tinkering to make it fun.
